description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a build_kinetic job in the build stage using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/srrg-software/srrg_mpr/docker/ros_kinetic with tags docker and linux. The job reuses a before_script that exports TERM=xterm and SHELL=/bin/bash, updates git submodules, starts ssh-agent, adds the SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, creates ~/.ssh, disables strict host key checking when inside Docker, creates a temporary this_package directory, rsyncs the repository excluding this_package, removes and recreates the src directory, runs catkin build --no-status, moves this_package into src, upgrades catkin_tools_fetch via pip, and fetches catkin dependencies from git@gitlab.com:srrg-software. The main script then runs catkin build --no-status --verbose, catkin run_tests --no-status --verbose, and catkin test --no-status --verbose.
